title: potentilla dombeyi var. dombeyi
intro: Potentilla dombeyi var. dombeyi, also known as Dombey's cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Potentilla dombeyi var. dombeyi include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Potentilla dombeyi var. dombeyi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in traditional Chinese medicine to make medicinal preparations.
